case_title: DOUGLAS REYES VS. ANTHONY WHITESIDE et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-25-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WHITESIDE, ANTHONY
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-27-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-27-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DOUGLAS REYES, AND PARIS TORRES BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF APR-27-2011 AT 1:30PM.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT MATTHEW RICHARDS, RETURNED "UNABLE TO FORWARD/UNDELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED".
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,183.91 FILED BY REYES, DOUGLAS AS TO DEFENDANT WHITESIDE, ANTHONY TORRES, PARIS RICHARDS, MATTHEW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-27-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNABLE TO FORWARD FOR REASON "FORWARDING ORDER EXPIRED" BY POSTAL SERVICE FOR DEFT MATTHEW RICHARDS .

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REYES, DOUGLAS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WHITESIDE, ANTHONY $5,183.91 PRINCIPAL, $113.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,296.91, CLAMIS AGAINST PARIS TORRES AND DOUGLAS REYES DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (LACK OF SERVICE) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
